_note: workflow_json should contain the ComfyUI API-format prompt (the 'nodes' key from the workflow file, keyed by node ID as strings). Replace with your actual workflow. loras[] is optional — only needed for LoRAs not in models/loras/ already.

workflow_json._comment: Paste your ComfyUI API-format workflow here. This is the 'prompt' object (dict keyed by node_id strings). You can get it from ComfyUI UI: Menu → Queue Prompt → copy the API JSON.

loras._comment: Example of a RUNTIME lora download (not in models/loras/ yet). Remove this if all LoRAs are pre-downloaded via provisioning.sh.
loras.name: my_custom_lora_v1.safetensors
